Led by experienced ophthalmologist Andrew Plummer, MD, we emphasize the importance of personalized care and empower people in the community to stay informed and proactive about their eye health. Our office features the latest proven technologies to provide world-class results for  cataract surgery , minimally invasive glaucoma surgery , and laser eye surgery . We specialize in premium refractive cataract surgery so individuals can enjoy life without the constraints of eyeglasses or contacts. In addition to optimizing your visual acuity, our team offers diagnostic testing and customized treatment plans for various chronic conditions, including dry eye and glaucoma. Diabetic eye exams are also available to lower risk factors for diabetic retinopathy and other diabetes-related eye diseases. The Spark Eye Care team takes a compassionate, personalized approach to managing patient eye care needs. We prioritize patient comfort and safety to ensure the best possible outcome at each visit. We also use cutting-edge technologies to maximize vision and protect long-term eye health. Appointment times are flexible, and Dr. Plummer is known for taking the time to ensure everyone gets the focused attention they deserve. Our team values integrity and appreciates patient feedback, so we can ensure our staff delivers consistent, attentive, top-quality eye care. Schedule a consultation with Spark Eye Care in Kyle, Texas, today, or book an appointment online. Learn more Our Mission At Spark Eye Care, we believe better vision changes lives. So proud to support him in his new practice in Kyle. We live in SW Austin so it’s easier to get to him than someone in central Austin. Highly recommend! James Long Dr. Plummer is fantastic. I was seen on time. He took the time to explain my eye issues in detail, including his using a plastic model of an eye and its various components. He also submitted a detailed written report to my general doctor within a day of my visit. Rest assured that you will receive quality service visiting him. S. Ardekani From the front desk staff, Ashley and Dr. Plummer it was a great experience. Ashley was very patient and helpful throughout the process. Dr. Plummer is professional and knowledgeable about my diagnosis. He knew exactly the treatment I needed and scheduled as soon as possible. Great care and support at this facility. Ángel & Connie Miralrio After moving here from South Carolina last fall, my PCP recommended Westlake. I was fortunate to meet with Dr. Plummer and have seen him three times. I have been very pleased with his kindness and knowledge, so much so that he will be performing my cataract surgery in a few weeks. Bobbie Carbaugh I am absolutely thrilled with my experience with Dr. Plummer and his staff during my recent cataract surgery! Everyone I encountered at the office and surgery Center were pleasant and treated me as if I was their only patient! Dr. Plummer takes his time to answer ever question. I also noticed in the surgery that they were checking and double checking that everything was accurate! Definitely a 5 out of 5! Doreen Stevenson I had a very nice experience at Westlake Eye Specialists in Kyle today. I’ve been considering getting LASIK done for some time now. Dr. Plummer was very thorough. He explained everything and made sure I understood the risks and side effects that could potentially happen with lasik. He answered all of my questions and concerns. Needless to say, I booked my pre op appointment and I am very excited to be moving forward with this process. Samantha McAllister Dr. Plummer is an excellent doctor.
